content: TASK-050 checkpoint done under TASK-010: initial sanitized public GitHub repo ai-org-labs/archmap was created/pushed, but the first Pages workflow failed during npm ci prepare/build because CI lacked Node type declarations for node:fs/node:url used by tests and Vite config. Added explicit @types/node dev dependency and verified npm run typecheck + npm run build locally. Next: push the CI fix to the sanitized public repo, confirm GitHub Pages workflow succeeds, publish @archmap/core@0.1.0 to npm, and verify jsDelivr CDN URLs. If npm publish asks for OTP/MFA, request it from the human. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
